title: Syntax error when reading liberty file
body:
### Version

Yosys 0.58+162 (git sha1 5d0847f6f, clang++ 18.1.8 -fPIC -O3)

### On which OS did this happen?

Linux

### Reproduction Steps

```bash
wget https://github.com/The-OpenROAD-Project/OpenROAD/raw/refs/heads/master/test/Nangate45/Nangate45_typ.lib
```
```
// yosys.tcl
yosys -import
dfflibmap -liberty Nangate45_typ.lib
```

### Expected Behavior

The `dfflibmap` command ends successfully.

When using the version one week ago (Yosys 0.58+98 (git sha1 797780eda, clang++ 18.1.8 -fPIC -O3)), yosys can read this liberty file successfully.

### Actual Behavior

```
1. Executing DFFLIBMAP pass (mapping DFF cells to sequential cells from liberty file).
ERROR: Syntax error in liberty file on line 22053.
  Unexpected token: ;
```
